customer_name.evidence: Agent: Very good afternoon, Gautam baat kar raha hu HDFC Life ke behalf se.

gender.evidence: Agent: ...aapki shaadi ho gayi hai ki nahi abhi? Married ho ki nahi aap? Customer: Ho gayi. Agent: ...aapke bacche kal ke din bade ho gaye sir...

income_band_inr.evidence: Agent: ...mahine ka lagbhag aap 40-45 hazaar kama lete hoge? Customer: Hmm, aaram se.

objections.quote: Mera kuch bhi isme bachta nahi hai. Mere teen loan chalu hai.

monthly_savings_capacity_inr.evidence: Customer: Is par kuch bachta hi nahi hai.

investment_sophistication.evidence: Customer: Main hai khata post mein, post office mein invest karta hu.

primary_goal.evidence: Agent: ...bacche kal ke din bade honge sir... Customer: Us par socha hi nahi hai.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: Mera kuch bhi isme bachta nahi hai. Mere teen loan chalu hai.

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer has no disposable income and is heavily reliant on debt for lifestyle expenses.

approachability.reasoning: Customer is heavily leveraged with multiple EMIs and explicitly stated he has no savings capacity, showing no interest in further financial products.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent introduced an HDFC Life guaranteed savings plan and immediately claimed a 35% return, to which the customer responded with hesitation.
call_narrative.customer_response: Customer was passive initially but became increasingly defensive and dismissive as the agent pushed despite his clear financial constraints.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer revealed he has multiple active loans (Bullet, iPhone, car) and no surplus income, which the agent ignored to continue the pitch.
call_narrative.ending: The agent acknowledged the customer's lack of interest and ended the call abruptly.

key_quotes: Mera kuch bhi isme bachta nahi hai. Mere teen loan chalu hai.
Is par kuch bachta hi nahi hai. Ye mobile ka hafta bhi main kaise nikalta hu mere ko pata hai.
